DEATH_CERT.summary: Official legal document certifying death - foundation for all post-bereavement procedures
DEATH_CERT.what: A Death Certificate is an official record issued by the municipal authority confirming death with details like date, time, place, and cause.

default.where: Local Municipal Corporation / Civil Registration Department

DEATH_CERT.legalImportance: Mandatory for all inheritance, insurance claims, and financial settlements
DEATH_CERT.challenges: Delays in peak times, may need multiple visits if documents incomplete
DEATH_CERT.tips: Register within 21 days for normal registration. Get 5-10 authenticated copies.

SUCCESSION_CERT.summary: Court-issued document establishing rightful heirs to the deceased's property
SUCCESSION_CERT.what: Succession Certificate identifies legal heirs and establishes inheritance rights

how: Submit family tree and property details

SUCCESSION_CERT.legalImportance: Essential for property transfer and proving inheritance rights
SUCCESSION_CERT.tips: Prepare family tree clearly. Keep all property documents ready.

EPF_FORM_20.summary: Employee Provident Fund death claim form for nominee withdrawal
EPF_FORM_20.what: Form 20 used to claim EPF balance as nominee after employee's death

default.where: EPFO Office or Online at epfoservices.gov.in

EPF_FORM_20.legalImportance: Critical for accessing deceased's EPF savings
EPF_FORM_20.challenges: Verification delays, may require multiple submissions
EPF_FORM_20.tips: Ensure nominee details match Aadhar. Keep EPF passbook handy.

BANK_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer or close bank account and settle balance to nominee
BANK_TRANSFER.what: Process to transfer bank account balances and access to nominee or close account
BANK_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Essential for accessing and settling financial assets
BANK_TRANSFER.challenges: Bank delays, may require multiple visits
BANK_TRANSFER.tips: Contact multiple banks if deceased had accounts in different branches. Keep transaction statements.

INSURANCE_CLAIM.summary: File death claim with life insurance company for policy payout
INSURANCE_CLAIM.what: Process to claim insurance policy benefits after death
INSURANCE_CLAIM.challenges: Claims denial if paperwork incomplete, medical verification delays
INSURANCE_CLAIM.tips: File claim immediately. Keep policy document safe. Gather all death documents beforehand.

PROPERTY_MUTATION.summary: Transfer property ownership in revenue records to heir
PROPERTY_MUTATION.what: Official transfer of property title in government revenue records
PROPERTY_MUTATION.legalImportance: Essential for establishing legal ownership of property
PROPERTY_MUTATION.challenges: Long processing time, bureaucratic delays, may require multiple visits
PROPERTY_MUTATION.tips: Apply early to avoid property disputes. Hire advocate if needed. Keep receipts of all fees paid.

PENSION_TRANSFER.summary: Convert deceased employee's pension to family pension
PENSION_TRANSFER.what: Process to transfer government employee pension to family
PENSION_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Ensures continued financial support for family
PENSION_TRANSFER.tips: Submit immediately after death. Keep pension account updated. Inform all beneficiaries.

VEHICLE_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer vehicle registration to heir through RTO
VEHICLE_TRANSFER.what: Process to officially transfer vehicle ownership in RC
VEHICLE_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Mandatory for legal use and insurance of vehicle
VEHICLE_TRANSFER.challenges: RTO procedures vary by state, inspection requirements
VEHICLE_TRANSFER.tips: Ensure vehicle is roadworthy. Keep insurance current during transfer. Get new registration certificate.

IT_FINAL_RETURN.summary: File final income tax return for deceased and obtain legal heir certificate
IT_FINAL_RETURN.what: Final ITR requirements and legal heir documentation for taxpayers
IT_FINAL_RETURN.legalImportance: Required for property transfer and tax clearance
IT_FINAL_RETURN.challenges: Complex documentation, may require CA assistance
IT_FINAL_RETURN.tips: Use registered CA to file ITR. Keep all tax documents organized. File within deadline.

POST_OFFICE_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer NSC, KVP, and savings accounts at post office
POST_OFFICE_TRANSFER.what: Process to transfer post office savings schemes and accounts

default.where: Home Post Office or Postal Branch

POST_OFFICE_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Access to post office savings and investments
POST_OFFICE_TRANSFER.tips: Visit with complete documentation. Keep passbook safe. Get receipt of application.

MUTUAL_FUNDS_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer mutual fund units to nominee
MUTUAL_FUNDS_TRANSFER.what: Process to claim and transfer MF holdings
MUTUAL_FUNDS_TRANSFER.challenges: Verification of nominee, market volatility during processing
MUTUAL_FUNDS_TRANSFER.tips: Don't sell MF during transfer process. Keep statement and investment records.

LOAN_SETTLEMENT.summary: Settle outstanding loans using insurance or estate assets
LOAN_SETTLEMENT.what: Process to pay off deceased's outstanding loans
LOAN_SETTLEMENT.legalImportance: Essential to clear debts before asset distribution
LOAN_SETTLEMENT.challenges: High loan amounts, insurance claim disputes
LOAN_SETTLEMENT.tips: Check all loan documents. Prioritize high-interest loans first. Request loan waiver clauses.

AADHAR_DEATH_UPDATE.summary: Update Aadhar records with death information
AADHAR_DEATH_UPDATE.what: Inform UIDAI about death for Aadhar database update

default.where: UIDAI Online Portal or Aadhar Center

AADHAR_DEATH_UPDATE.legalImportance: Prevents identity fraud and duplicate benefits
AADHAR_DEATH_UPDATE.tips: Report death within 30 days. Upload clear copy of death certificate.

PAN_DEATH_UPDATE.summary: Update PAN records with death information at Income Tax Department
PAN_DEATH_UPDATE.what: Notify IT Department of death for PAN cancellation

default.where: Income Tax Department or Online e-filing

PAN_DEATH_UPDATE.legalImportance: Prevents tax-related fraud and duplicate filings
PAN_DEATH_UPDATE.tips: File early using e-filing. Keep PAN certificate copies. Monitor ITD portal for updates.

GST_CLOSURE.summary: Close GST registration of deceased taxpayer
GST_CLOSURE.what: Deregister from GST if deceased was registered business owner
GST_CLOSURE.legalImportance: Prevents continued tax liabilities and penalties
GST_CLOSURE.tips: Settle all pending taxes first. File GST returns up to date. Keep GST certificate.

PASSPORT_CANCELLATION.what: Formal cancellation of passport to prevent misuse
PASSPORT_CANCELLATION.tips: Submit original passport if available. Keep cancellation confirmation. Report if passport lost.

VEHICLE_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer motor insurance policy to new vehicle owner
VEHICLE_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.what: Process to transfer vehicle insurance to heir

how: Provide death certificate and new RC

VEHICLE_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.tips: Transfer immediately after getting new RC. Keep insurance active. Request updated premium.

DRIVING_LICENSE_CANCELLATION.summary: Cancel driving license after death at RTO
DRIVING_LICENSE_CANCELLATION.what: Formal cancellation of DL to prevent misuse
DRIVING_LICENSE_CANCELLATION.tips: Submit as soon as possible. Keep cancellation confirmation. Report if DL lost.

PROPERTY_TAX_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer property tax assessment to heir at municipality
PROPERTY_TAX_TRANSFER.what: Update property tax records in heir's name
PROPERTY_TAX_TRANSFER.tips: Clear any tax arrears first. Keep property documents. Get receipt of application.

ELECTRICITY_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer electricity connection to heir at electricity board
ELECTRICITY_TRANSFER.what: Update electricity bill in heir's name
ELECTRICITY_TRANSFER.tips: Clear outstanding bills first. Provide accurate meter reading. Keep bill copies.

WATER_CONNECTION_TRANSFER.what: Update water supply bill in heir's name
WATER_CONNECTION_TRANSFER.tips: Settle outstanding bills. Verify connection details. Keep bill copies.

GAS_CONNECTION_TRANSFER.what: Update gas connection in heir's name
GAS_CONNECTION_TRANSFER.tips: Clear pending bills. Verify consumer number. Get new ID card.

TELEPHONE_TRANSFER.what: Update telephone connection in heir's name

how: New bill issued in heir's name

TELEPHONE_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Ensures service continuity and legal liability
TELEPHONE_TRANSFER.tips: Pay outstanding bills first. Provide proof of residence. Keep bill copies.

AGRICULTURAL_LAND_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer agricultural land ownership to heir
AGRICULTURAL_LAND_TRANSFER.what: Official transfer of farming land in revenue records
AGRICULTURAL_LAND_TRANSFER.challenges: Land disputes, boundary issues, long processing
AGRICULTURAL_LAND_TRANSFER.tips: Get latest land records. Clarify boundaries. Hire surveyor if needed. Keep land papers safe.

COMMERCIAL_PROPERTY_TRANSFER.what: Official transfer of commercial building/space ownership
COMMERCIAL_PROPERTY_TRANSFER.challenges: Higher costs, complex documentation, tenant complications
COMMERCIAL_PROPERTY_TRANSFER.tips: Use advocate for registration. Settle tenant issues first. Keep property certificate.

RENTAL_AGREEMENT_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer rental property agreement to heir
RENTAL_AGREEMENT_TRANSFER.what: Update rental agreement with new owner
RENTAL_AGREEMENT_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Ensures legal rental income and tenant rights
RENTAL_AGREEMENT_TRANSFER.tips: Notify tenants officially. Review rental agreement terms. Get new lease signed.

TWO_WHEELER_TRANSFER.tips: Ensure insurance is current. Get all documents. Keep transfer receipt.

COMMERCIAL_VEHICLE_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer commercial vehicle registration (taxi, truck, bus)
COMMERCIAL_VEHICLE_TRANSFER.what: Transfer commercial vehicle ownership and permits
COMMERCIAL_VEHICLE_TRANSFER.challenges: Complex commercial procedures, operator license issues
COMMERCIAL_VEHICLE_TRANSFER.tips: Transfer business license first. Update operator credentials. Keep all commercial docs.

NREGA_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer MGNREGA job card to new household head
NREGA_TRANSFER.what: Official transfer of rural employment scheme card
NREGA_TRANSFER.tips: Contact GP for assistance. Keep job card safe. Verify household registration.

RATION_CARD_TRANSFER.summary: Update ration card with new head of family
RATION_CARD_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Ensures access to subsidized food grains
RATION_CARD_TRANSFER.tips: Get new card immediately. Verify household members. Keep card safe.

WIDOW_PENSION_APPLICATION.summary: Apply for widow/widower pension from government
WIDOW_PENSION_APPLICATION.what: Government assistance program for spouses of deceased
WIDOW_PENSION_APPLICATION.legalImportance: Ensures financial security for surviving spouse
WIDOW_PENSION_APPLICATION.challenges: Income limits, property restrictions, processing delays
WIDOW_PENSION_APPLICATION.tips: Apply soon after death. Get GP recommendation. Verify eligibility criteria. Keep pension book.

ORPHAN_BENEFITS_APPLICATION.summary: Apply for orphan benefits for minor children
ORPHAN_BENEFITS_APPLICATION.what: Government assistance for children of deceased
ORPHAN_BENEFITS_APPLICATION.legalImportance: Ensures financial support for orphaned children
ORPHAN_BENEFITS_APPLICATION.challenges: Age limit restrictions, income criteria, processing delays
ORPHAN_BENEFITS_APPLICATION.tips: Apply before age restrictions expire. Gather all children documents. Keep welfare ID.

SCHOLARSHIP_TRANSFER.summary: Update student scholarship with death of parent/guardian
SCHOLARSHIP_TRANSFER.what: Modify scholarship eligibility due to parent death
SCHOLARSHIP_TRANSFER.tips: Inform school/college immediately. Get new income certificate. Follow institutional process.

HEALTH_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer health insurance policy to new member
HEALTH_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.what: Update health insurance coverage after death
HEALTH_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.challenges: Premium recalculation, waiting period for new members
HEALTH_INSURANCE_TRANSFER.tips: Transfer immediately to avoid coverage gap. Review coverage amounts. Update beneficiaries.

STOCK_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer stocks and securities to nominee
STOCK_TRANSFER.what: Process for transferring share market investments
STOCK_TRANSFER.challenges: Market volatility, registration delays, tax implications
STOCK_TRANSFER.tips: Don't panic sell. Keep all share certificates. Monitor market during transfer.

FIXED_DEPOSIT_TRANSFER.challenges: Interest calculation, Bank delays, nomination disputes
FIXED_DEPOSIT_TRANSFER.tips: Keep FD certificate safe. Clarify interest accrual. Verify bank account details.

SAFE_DEPOSIT_LOCKER.summary: Access and transfer safe deposit locker to heir
SAFE_DEPOSIT_LOCKER.what: Process to open locker and transfer contents
SAFE_DEPOSIT_LOCKER.legalImportance: Access to valuables and important documents
SAFE_DEPOSIT_LOCKER.challenges: Bank procedures, inventory disputes, lost keys
SAFE_DEPOSIT_LOCKER.tips: Bring locker receipt. Take bank representative. Get inventory certificate.

CREDIT_CARD_CANCELLATION.summary: Cancel credit card and settle any outstanding dues
CREDIT_CARD_CANCELLATION.what: Deactivate credit card account after death
CREDIT_CARD_CANCELLATION.tips: Report death immediately. Settle any dues. Cancel immediately to prevent fraud.

CRYPTO_TRANSFER.summary: Transfer cryptocurrency and digital assets to heir
CRYPTO_TRANSFER.what: Access and transfer digital currency holdings
CRYPTO_TRANSFER.challenges: Lost password/keys, exchange delays, legal uncertainty, market volatility
CRYPTO_TRANSFER.tips: Keep recovery phrases/keys safe. Use recognized exchanges. Monitor holdings during transfer.

BUSINESS_CLOSURE.summary: Close shop license and business registration

default.where: Registrar of Firms / Business Registration Office

BUSINESS_CLOSURE.challenges: Outstanding taxes, employee issues, creditor claims
BUSINESS_CLOSURE.tips: Settle taxes first. Notify employees. Pay creditors. Get closure certificate.

PARTNERSHIP_DISSOLUTION.summary: Dissolve partnership agreement after death of partner
PARTNERSHIP_DISSOLUTION.challenges: Complex accounting, creditor disputes, asset division
PARTNERSHIP_DISSOLUTION.tips: Get professional accountant. Settle all partnership liabilities. Get dissolution certificate.

COMPANY_SHARES_TRANSFER.legalImportance: Access to company shares and dividends
COMPANY_SHARES_TRANSFER.challenges: Transfer delays, share value changes, dividend timing
COMPANY_SHARES_TRANSFER.tips: Keep share certificate safe. Track dividend dates. Use registered agent for transfer.

WILL_PROBATE.summary: Get will probated through court for legal succession
WILL_PROBATE.what: Court approval and execution of will
WILL_PROBATE.legalImportance: Legally validates will and enables asset distribution
WILL_PROBATE.challenges: Long court process, contested wills, high costs
WILL_PROBATE.tips: Use advocate for probate. Keep will safe. Gather all asset documents. Be prepared for delays.

GUARDIANSHIP_PETITION.summary: File guardianship petition for minor children
GUARDIANSHIP_PETITION.what: Court appointment of legal guardian for minors
GUARDIANSHIP_PETITION.legalImportance: Legally protects children's interests and welfare
GUARDIANSHIP_PETITION.challenges: Court delays, competing claims, property management
GUARDIANSHIP_PETITION.tips: Act quickly before default appointment. Choose responsible guardian. Gather character references.

COPRA_APPLICATION.summary: File consumer complaint for denied insurance claim
COPRA_APPLICATION.what: Legal action if insurance claim is denied

how: Get claim rejection letter from insurance
default.cost: Filing fee (₹500-5000 based on claim value)

COPRA_APPLICATION.legalImportance: Protects rights when legitimate claims are denied
COPRA_APPLICATION.challenges: Long legal process, complex documentation, legal costs
COPRA_APPLICATION.tips: Consult lawyer immediately. Document all communications. Keep all policy documents.
